name: Draw Fighter 3D Game
description: Draw Fighter 3d is an interesting drawing game. You can draw a powerful fighter through your imagination, draw the corresponding parts according to the enemy's equipment, and use various powerful parts to defeat the enemy and complete the level. The scenes are rich in content and the gameplay is exciting and interesting. Come and experience it.
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fight, Fighting, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids
